tools.name: delegate_task
tools.description:
[Supervisor Tool] Delegate a complex sub-task to a specialized worker agent.
The worker will run autonomously and return its final response.

worker_name.description: The name of the specialized worker agent to delegate to (e.g. 'math_expert', 'researcher').
worker_name.title: Worker Name

task_instructions.description: Detailed instructions for what the worker needs to accomplish.
task_instructions.title: Task Instructions

tools.name: calculate
tools.description:
Perform a basic arithmetic calculation.
Supports: add, subtract, multiply, divide.

operation.description: The arithmetic operation to perform. Must be one of: add, subtract, multiply, divide.
operation.title: Operation

tools.name: transfer_agent
tools.description:
[System Tool] Transfer the current session to a different Agent.
Call this tool ONLY when you realize the user's request requires the expertise of a different specialized agent.

target_agent.description: The name of the agent to transfer to. For example: 'CodeEngineer', 'DatabaseAdmin'.
target_agent.title: Target Agent

reason.description: The reason for the handoff, summarizing what needs to be done next.
reason.title: Reason
